history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An image shows four tall, smartphone-style game result cards side by side with fantasy character portraits, level and rank information, and small reward and icon indicators.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is four vertical panels displaying game-like status screens featuring stylized character illustrations. The leftmost panel shows a golden-armored male character portrait; the second panel shows a teal-haired female character portrait with a white ruffled headpiece; the third panel shows a similar golden-armored male character portrait; and the rightmost panel shows a darker, purple-toned armored male character portrait. Each panel includes header text, a large character art area, and rows of small icons and star ratings near the bottom.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital game interface screen with no real-world background. The overall backdrop behind the panels is a soft blue gradient with faint, cloudy or sky-like tones, and the panels float on top of it.

Visual Details:
The panels have rounded corners and glossy UI styling with dark blue and bronze color themes. Each panel has a top header area with a small icon row and a central name and level. The character portraits are framed by decorative golden or colored lighting effects: the left and third panels use warm golden rays and gold accents; the second panel uses warm highlights behind the character; the right panel uses darker, purplish shading with a more shadowed background. Below the portraits are small circular or badge-like icons in several colored slots, followed by larger star icons and additional small grayscale icons. Near the very bottom, each card shows a timestamp in a light font, and some cards display a gold ribbon or badge with an emblem above the timestamp.

Visible Text:

No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image presents four game result/statistic cards with character portraits, level and rank labels, icon rows, and a timestamp at the bottom of each card. The panels are arranged in a row and use contrasting blue and gold/dark color themes for different outcomes.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
